recommendations.title: 7 Days in Havana
recommendations.overview: A lesbian, an aspiring actor, an aspiring singer, a low-class marriage, a neighborhood community and 2 renowned directors have memorable less-than-24-hour-long experiences while living in/visiting the capital of Cuba.
recommendations.director: Pablo Trapero, Gaspar Noé, Julio Medem, Benicio del Toro, Elia Suleiman, Juan Carlos Tabío, Laurent Cantet

recommendations.title: Night on Earth
recommendations.overview: A quintet of cabbies in five cities and their remarkable fares on the same eventful night.

recommendations.title: To Each His Own Cinema

recommendations.title: Millennium Actress

recommendations.title: Three Colors: White
recommendations.overview: Polish immigrant Karol Karol finds himself out of a marriage, a job and a country when his French wife, Dominique, divorces him after six months due to his impotence. Forced to leave France after losing the business they jointly owned, Karol enlists

recommendations.title: Day for Night
recommendations.overview: A committed filmmaker struggles to complete his latest project while coping with a myriad of crises, personal and professional, among the cast and crew.

recommendations.title: The Kite Runner
recommendations.overview: After spending years in California, Amir returns to his homeland in Afghanistan to help his old friend Hassan, whose son is in trouble.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: The Watermelon Woman
recommendations.overview: A young black lesbian filmmaker probes into the life of The Watermelon Woman, a 1930s black actress who played 'mammy' archetypes.
